---
name: Bug report
about: Report a failing test or framework issue
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Failing test
Which test(s) fail? e.g. `tests/ui/test_login.py::TestLogin::test_valid_login`

## Steps to reproduce
1. Run `pytest -m ...`
2. See error

## Expected behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour
What actually happened. Paste the relevant traceback.

## Environment
- OS:
- Python version:
- Browser (chromium/firefox/webkit):
- Local or CI:

## Screenshots / logs
Attach the failure screenshot from `screenshots/` if available.
